error_signature: workflow stuck when reading large file from disk
title: Workflow stuck on large file read
symptom: The workflow hangs indefinitely when attempting to read a large file (260mb; .zip) using the Read/Write Files from Disk node.
applies_when: Using Read/Write Files from Disk node
not_this_if: File size is manageable within available memory
No workflow options are enabled that affect execution
root_cause: When reading large files, n8n may run into memory limitations, especially in a Docker environment with constrained resources. This can cause the workflow to hang without providing an error message.
fix_steps: Create a custom Docker image with rclone installed
Use rclone to clone the large file to your drive instead of reading it directly in n8n
agent_instruction: Set up a custom Docker image with rclone and use it to handle large file transfers.
